case_title: WISTON EDGARDO GONZALEZ VS. ALEXANDER JOSE PERALTA PALACIOS

docket_entries.description: REQUEST TO WAIVE COURT FEES AND COSTS PURSUANT TO G.C. 68633, CRC 3.51, 8.26, AND 8.818 (CONFIDENTIAL) FILED BY PLAINTIFF GONZALEZ, WISTON EDGARDO ORDER FOR WAIVER OF COURT FEES AND COSTS GRANTED PURSUANT TO G.C. 68634 (E), CRC 3.52

THE COURT ORDERS DISMISSAL OF THE ENTIRE ACTION WITH PREJUDICE. PLAINTIFF WISTON EDGARDO GONZALEZ IS NOT PRESENT. DEFENDANT ALEXANDER JOSE PERALTA PALACIOS IS PRESENT. DEFENDANT IS ASSISTED BY SPANISH INTERPRETER ROSARIO DEL PILAR ESPINOSA. NO EXHIBITS RETAINED. JUDGE PRO TEM: DAIVD FLEISIG; CLERK: D. CARTER. NOT REPORTED.(D506)
MONEY CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF FOR $5,000.00 FILED BY GONZALEZ, WISTON EDGARDO AS TO DEFENDANT PERALTA PALACIOS, ALEXANDER JOSE ORDER SETTING TRIAL ISSUED FOR JUL-25-2024 AT 08:30 AM IN DEPT 506

PROOF OF SERVICE FILED ON CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF SERVICE FEE: $50 (WAIVED) REMARKS: RESPONDENT CAME TO THE SHERIFF'S OFFICE AT CITY HALL, ROOM 456 AND WAS SERVED THE DOCUMENTS. SERVED JUN-12-2024, PERSONAL SERVICE AS TO DEFENDANT PERALTA PALACIOS, ALEXANDER JOSE
